<style id='ambassadorflow-coupon-popup-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>

#ambassadorflow-wrapper-popup {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 9999;
}

#ambassadorflow-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background-color: #999999;
    opacity: 0.65;
    z-index: 10001;
}

#ambassadorflow-popup-close-button {
    opacity: 0;
    display: block;
    transition: opacity 1s ease-in;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

.ambassadorflow-popup {
    position: fixed;
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    max-width: 350px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    background: #FFF;
    box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px 10px rgba(153, 153, 153, 0.10);
    padding: 12px;
    z-index: 10002;
    width: 100%;
    animation: fadeIn 0.7s ease forwards;
}

.ambassadorflow-popup-close svg {
    fill: #CCC;
}

.ambassadorflow-popup-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 15px;
    right: 15px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

span.coupon-text {
    font-weight: 700;
}

.ambassadorflow-popup-content {
    text-align: center;
}

.ambassadorflow-image-section {
    font-size: 100px;
    line-height: 130px;
}

.ambassadorflow-image-section img {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
}

.ambassadorflow-close-window-button {
    background-color: #93D048;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 10px 20px 8px;
    font-size: 16px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 5px;
    transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
}

.ambassadorflow-info-text-section {
    padding: 0 0 20px 0;
    font-size:15px;
}

.ambassadorflow-close-window-button:hover {
    background-color: #82c03e;
}

.ambassadorflow-coupon-message-section {
    font-size: 30px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    padding: 0 0 15px;
}

.ambassadorflow-closing-window-text {
    height: 20px;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #BBB;
    line-height: 20px;
    text-align: center;
    display: none;
}

.ambassadorflow-closing-text-wrapper {
    height: 20px;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

@media (min-width: 751px) {
    .ambassadorflow-popup {
        max-width: 480px;
        border-radius: 16px;
        padding: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0px 0px 13px 13px rgba(153, 153, 153, 0.10);
    }
    .ambassadorflow-popup-close {
        top: 20px;
        right: 20px;
        width: 26px;
        height: 26px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-image-section {
        font-size: 120px;
        line-height: 170px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-close-window-button {
        padding: 13px 26px 10px;
        font-size: 18px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-coupon-message-section {
        font-size: 36px;
        padding-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-info-text-section {
        padding-bottom: 26px;
        font-size:16px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-closing-window-text {
        height: 26px;
        font-size: 18px;
        line-height: 26px;
    }
    .ambassadorflow-closing-text-wrapper {
        height: 26px;
        margin-top: 13px;
    }
}
/*# sourceURL=ambassadorflow-coupon-popup-style-inline-css */
</style>
